scripts.build: echo '=== SHARED TYPES ===' && head -55 ../../packages/shared/src/types.ts && echo '=== SHARED PKG ===' && cat ../../packages/shared/package.json && echo '=== NODE_MODULES LINK ===' && ls -la ../../node_modules/@typeoff/shared && echo '=== NM TYPES ===' && head -55 ../../node_modules/@typeoff/shared/src/types.ts 2>/dev/null || echo 'not found' && next build
